description_long: This is a sleek, single-engine airplane with a long, narrow fuselage and an expansive straight wingspan. The wings are mounted at a mid-level position on the fuselage and extend symmetrically with no visible sweep or winglets. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and features a clear, enclosed canopy, likely accommodating one or two seats. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer mounted low. The landing gear is tricycle type, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel. The exterior is primarily white with subtle gray and blue accents, giving it a modern and aerodynamic appearance.
description: A streamlined, single-engine airplane with a mid-mounted straight wingspan, enclosed forward cockpit, and conventional tail. The exterior is mostly white with gray and blue details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, mid-mounted wings, and the clear cockpit canopy at the front.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full wingspan, single vertical stabilizer, and the horizontal stabilizer at the tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with visible landing gear and cockpit details.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the symmetrical straight wings, nose-mounted propeller, and the cockpit canopy.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight, unswept wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a front propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and low-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a clear canopy, likely single or dual seat.
